hypothesis: If SSNEB calculations are pre-converged using pretrained equivariant ML surrogates (EquiformerV2 or eSEN) and then refined with DFT, then for CsPbI3 phase transitions and the TiO2-B→anatase transformation they will reproduce VASP-only barriers within 0.1 eV while reducing DFT NEB iterations and wall time by at least a factor of two, because the ML models provide sufficiently accurate energies, forces, and stresses to place images near the true MEP.
